description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark wood front and lighter, horizontally-striped wood sides and back. The front features three large, flat drawer faces with subtle horizontal grooves that likely serve as integrated handles, giving it a sleek, handle-less appearance. The top of the cabinet is open, revealing a hollow interior, which suggests it may be missing a top panel or is designed for easy access from above. The sides and back are finished in a light wood grain pattern, contrasting with the rich, dark wood of the front. The base is slightly recessed and finished in the same light wood as the sides, providing visual separation from the floor. This cabinet would be suitable for use in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, offices, or garages, offering ample storage space while maintaining a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a dark wood front and light wood sides, featuring three large drawers and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing three dark wood drawers with subtle horizontal grooves and a recessed light wood base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light, horizontally-striped wood grain and the open top, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain, light wood panel with horizontal stripes and no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the light wood grain and open top.
